title: Brokenfile
description: Is something watching you? Are you just paranoid?
body:
# About the mod
This mod will make you paranoid. It adds few anomalies, jumpscares and structures. It also makes your game look like old minecraft beta.

## Story

Brokenfile is a lost minecraft version that mojang hid from us. It contains some to say the least wierd thing.

### Recomendation

Play this without other mods (apart from Geckolib that is required).
